inputs.task: Design and implement a GitHub integration for Agentic SDLC gate approvals. The integration must preserve human-only approval authority, independent review, immutable evidence references, fail-closed behavior, and separation between lifecycle quality gates and mutation-oriented human gates. Define the GitHub API or Actions boundary, authentication, webhook/event handling, approval-to-run-record mapping, replay/idempotency protection, and tests. Do not approve gates, merge, deploy, or change persistent environments.
